sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`First Name` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Last Name` ,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Phone Number` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Organization` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID`,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`InstanceId`,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Department`  FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

SELECT DISTINCT `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Region` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Site` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Site Group` ,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Risk Level`  FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Impact` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Priority` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Status Reason` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Approval Status` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Urgency` ,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Approval Phase Name` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status`
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Organization` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Owner Support Company` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Group Name` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ChgImp`
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Organization` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Owner Support Company` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Group Name` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CAB Manager ( Change Co-ord )`
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Organization` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Owner Support Company` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Group Name` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASCHG`
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 1` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 2` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 3` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Name (2)` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Model/Version (2)` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Manufacturer (2)`  
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

Select Distinct `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 1` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 2` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 3` 
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
Select  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Reason For Change` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Environment` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Timing_Reason` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Type` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Description` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Detailed Description`
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

SELECT DISTINCT `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Requested Start Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual Start Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled End Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Requested End Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual End Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` ,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Last Modified Date` 
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 
where (
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` in ($changeId) 
)

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`"}
list.label: Status
list.name: Status
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` is not null then `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` else 'Unknown' end from `CHG:Infrastructure Change` WHERE  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}
list.label: Coordinator Group
list.name: Group
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "Select Distinct case when `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` is not null then `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` else 'Unknown' end from `CHG:Infrastructure Change` WHERE  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` in ($Company) limit 10"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`  WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` in ($Group) and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` in ($Company) and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ($Status) LIMIT 10"}
list.label: Change ID
list.name: changeId
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`  WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` in ($Group) and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` in ($Company) and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ($Status) LIMIT 10"}
